mapper.select:
SELECT MAX(POHB.VENDOR_CD) AS VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(MAX(POHB.GATE_CD), MAX(POHB.VENDOR_CD), #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , (SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_CREATE_DATE , MAX(POHB.CUR) AS CUR , SUM(POHB.ITEM_AMT) AS PO_AMT , MAX(POHB.VAT_TYPE) AS VAT_TYPE , MAX(#{ses.ctrlCd}) AS CTRL_CD , MAX(#{ses.userId}) AS CTRL_USER_ID , MAX(#{ses.userNm}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , MAX(POHB.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(MAX(POHB.GATE_CD), MAX(POHB.BUYER_CD), #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , MAX(POHB.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(MAX(POHB.GATE_CD), MAX(POHB.BUYER_CD), MAX(POHB.DEPT_CD), #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(MAX(POHB.GATE_CD), MAX(POHB.BUYER_CD), MAX(POHB.DEPT_CD), #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , '1' AS PAY_CNT FROM STOCPOHB POHB WHERE POHB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHB.PO_CREATE_TYPE = 'LAST' AND POHB.PB_BUYER_CD POHB.PR_NUM POHB.PR_SQ IN
#{value.PB_BUYER_CD} #{value.PR_NUM} #{value.PR_SQ}

SELECT POHB.ITEM_CD , POHB.ITEM_DESC , POHB.ITEM_SPEC , POHB.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.BUYER_CD, 'MK', POHB.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , POHB.MAKER_PART_NO , POHB.ORIGIN_CD , POHB.PO_QT , POHB.UNIT_CD , POHB.UNIT_PRC , POHB.ITEM_AMT , POHB.CTRL_CD , POHB.PR_NUM , POHB.PR_SQ , POHB.PO_WT_NUM , POHB.PURCHASE_TYPE , POHB.BUYER_CD , POHB.PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , POHB.PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.PR_BUYER_CD, POHB.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.PR_BUYER_CD, POHB.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHB.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPOHB POHB WHERE POHB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHB.PO_CREATE_TYPE = 'LAST' AND POHB.PB_BUYER_CD POHB.PR_NUM POHB.PR_SQ IN
#{value.PB_BUYER_CD} #{value.PR_NUM} #{value.PR_SQ}

SELECT distinct POHD.PO_NUM --선정품의나 기타 화면에서 품목복사를 하여, 구매의뢰 품목 개수보다 많아질 수 있음, CNDT.PR_SQ = PODT.PR_SQ 만으로는 중복데이터발생 , PODT.PO_SQ , PODT.PR_NUM , PODT.PR_SQ , PODT.ITEM_CD , PODT.ITEM_DESC , PODT.ITEM_SPEC , PODT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', PODT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , PODT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.ORIGIN_CD , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.UNIT_CD , PODT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , POHD.CTRL_CD , PODT.PO_WT_NUM , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , PODT.BUYER_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , (PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , (PODT.RMK) AS RMK , PODT.EXEC_NUM , CNDT.RFX_NUM , MTGL.MAJOR_ITEM_FLAG , PODT.PB_BUYER_CD , PODT.CONT_NUM , PODT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCMTGL MTGL ON (MTGL.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND MTGL.ITEM_CD = PODT.ITEM_CD AND MTGL.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCCNDT CNDT ON (CNDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND CNDT.PB_BUYER_CD = PODT.PB_BUYER_CD AND CNDT.PR_NUM = PODT.PR_NUM AND CNDT.PR_SQ = PODT.PR_SQ AND CNDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POHD.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT POPY.PO_NUM , POPY.PAY_CNT , MAX(POPY.PAY_CNT_TYPE) AS PAY_CNT_TYPE , MAX(POPY.PAY_CNT_NM) AS PAY_CNT_NM , MAX(POPY.PAY_PERCENT) AS PAY_PERCENT , MAX(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT , MAX(POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE) AS PAY_METHOD_TYPE , MAX(POPY.PAY_METHOD_NM) AS PAY_METHOD_NM , (MAX(POPY.PAY_DUE_DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_DUE_DATE , LISTAGG(POPC.PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY POPC.PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM) AS PY_BUYER_NM , MAX(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PY_PAY_AMT FROM STOCPOPY POPY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , PO_NUM , PAY_CNT , PY_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(GATE_CD, PY_BUYER_CD, 'KO') AS PY_BUYER_NM , PY_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(GATE_CD, PY_BUYER_CD, PY_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PY_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(GATE_CD, PY_BUYER_CD, PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM FROM STOCPOPC WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} ) POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT) WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} GROUP BY POPY.PO_NUM, POPY.PAY_CNT

SELECT POPY.PO_NUM , POPY.PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_TYPE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , POPC.PY_BUYER_CD , POPC.PY_DEPT_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD, POPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POPC.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , POPC.RMK FROM STOCPOPY POPY LEFT JOIN STOCPOPC POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT) WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = #{PAY_CNT}

SELECT POHB.PR_BUYER_CD AS PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , POHB.PR_DEPT_CD AS PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.PR_BUYER_CD, POHB.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.PR_BUYER_CD, POHB.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHB.PR_NUM , POHB.PR_SQ , POHB.SUBJECT , POHB.VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , POHB.PURCHASE_TYPE , POHB.ITEM_CD , POHB.ITEM_DESC , POHB.ITEM_SPEC , POHB.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.BUYER_CD, 'MK', POHB.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , POHB.MAKER_PART_NO , POHB.ORIGIN_CD , POHB.PO_QT , POHB.UNIT_CD , POHB.CUR , POHB.UNIT_PRC , POHB.ITEM_AMT , POHB.VAT_TYPE , POHB.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , PRHD.REQ_DATE , POHB.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPOHB POHB JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = POHB.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = POHB.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = POHB.PR_NUM) WHERE POHB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHB.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHB.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POHB.PO_CREATE_TYPE = 'LAST'
AND PRHD.REQ_DATE >= (#{FROM_REG_DATE})
AND PRHD.REQ_DATE <= (#{TO_REG_DATE})
AND POHB.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND UPPER(POHB.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHB.ITEM_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHB.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHB.PR_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHB.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHB.GATE_CD, POHB.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX (STOCPOHD INDEX [STOCPOHD_GATE_CD_IDX]) */ POHD.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , POHD.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM ,(SELECT LISTAGG(PR_BUYER_CD, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY PR_BUYER_CD) FROM (SELECT PR_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPODT WHERE GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY PR_BUYER_CD)) AS PR_BUYER_CD ,GETBUYERNAMES(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, 'PO', POHD.PO_NUM, NULL, NULL, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.PROGRESS_CD , POHD.SIGN_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN POHD.SIGN_STATUS IN ('T', 'P', 'R', 'C') THEN GETCOMCODE(POHD.GATE_CD, 'M020', POHD.SIGN_STATUS, 0, 'KO') ELSE GETCOMCODE(POHD.GATE_CD, 'M191', POHD.PROGRESS_CD, 0, 'KO') END) AS PROGRESS_CD_LOC , POHD.PO_NUM , POHD.SIGN_CNT , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.SUBJECT , POHD.VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , POHD.CUR , POHD.PO_AMT , POHD.VAT_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_DATE , POHD.VENDOR_REJECT_RMK , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_DATE , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_RMK , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , CASE WHEN POHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS EXEC_AUTH , POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCIVGH A JOIN STOCIVHD B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.INV_NUM = B.INV_NUM AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE A.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND A.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS INV_FLAG -- 2021.09.28 : 검수진행여부 ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT PO_NUM) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (PODT.CONT_NUM, PODT.CONT_CNT) IN (SELECT DISTINCT CONT_NUM, CONT_CNT FROM STOCPODT WHERE GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0')) > 1 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS PO_DUP_FLAG -- 2021.09.28 : 1건의 계약으로 2건 이상의 발주서 생성여부 ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_NUM) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_NUM ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_CNT) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_CNT FROM STOCPOHD POHD WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.PROGRESS_CD != '5100' AND (POHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCPODT WHERE GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PR_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') )
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_PO_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_PO_DATE})
AND (CASE WHEN POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) = #{FORCE_CLOSE_YN}
AND (UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(POHD.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS = #{VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS}
AND (POHD.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD} AND (POHD.SIGN_STATUS IS NULL OR POHD.SIGN_STATUS = 'T'))
AND (POHD.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD} AND POHD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E')
AND POHD.SIGN_STATUS = #{PROGRESS_CD}
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CTRL_USER_NM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
AND A.INSPECT_USER_NM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_NM}) '%'
AND A.VENDOR_NM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND A.PR_BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND A.PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND A.BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND A.BUYER_DEPT_NM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%'
ORDER BY A.PO_NUM DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN POHD.PROGRESS_CD != '5200' THEN '1' ELSE CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCIVGH A JOIN STOCIVHD B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.INV_NUM = B.INV_NUM AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE A.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND A.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END END AS DELIVERY_YN FROM STOCPOHD POHD WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM}

SELECT POHD.GATE_CD , POHD.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , POHD.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD AS PR_BUYER_CD , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD AS PR_DEPT_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , PODT.PROGRESS_CD , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , CASE WHEN PODT.FORCE_CLOSE_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS FORCE_CLOSE_YN , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , POHD.PO_NUM , POHD.SUBJECT , PODT.ITEM_CD , PODT.ITEM_DESC , PODT.ITEM_SPEC , PODT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', PODT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , PODT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.ORIGIN_CD , POHD.VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.UNIT_CD , POHD.CUR , PODT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , POHD.VAT_TYPE , PODT.DUE_DATE -- 2021.08.19 : 전체검수, 부분검수 동일하게 입고수량은 GR_QT ,(PODT.GR_QT, 0) AS GR_QT --,(CASE WHEN POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT ELSE PODT.INV_QT END) AS GR_QT -- 2021.02.25 : 검수금액이 변경가능 => 검수금액이 달라질 수 있음 --, CASE WHEN POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT ELSE PODT.INV_QT END * PODT.UNIT_PRC AS GR_ITEM_AMT ,((SELECT SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('300', '700') -- 검수요청(100, 200), 검수승인(300, 700) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0'), '0') AS GR_ITEM_AMT -- 2021.08.19 : 전체검수, 부분검수 동일하게 입고수량은 GR_QT ,(PODT.PO_QT - (PODT.GR_QT, 0)) AS GR_UN_QT ,(PODT.PO_QT - (PODT.GR_QT, 0)) * PODT.UNIT_PRC AS GR_UN_ITEM_AMT --,(PODT.PO_QT - ((CASE WHEN POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT ELSE PODT.INV_QT END), 0)) AS GR_UN_QT --,(PODT.PO_QT - ((CASE WHEN POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' THEN PODT.GR_QT ELSE PODT.INV_QT END), 0)) * PODT.UNIT_PRC AS GR_UN_ITEM_AMT , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_DATE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , PODT.PR_NUM , PODT.PR_SQ , PODT.EXEC_NUM , PODT.EXEC_SQ , PODT.CONT_NUM , PODT.CONT_CNT , PODT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (PODT.PR_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR POHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId}) AND POHD.PROGRESS_CD != '5100' AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS IN ('0', '200')
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND (UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND (UPPER(PODT.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(PODT.ITEM_DESC, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ITEM_DESC}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(POHD.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND PODT.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND UPPER(PODT.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY POHD.PO_NUM DESC, PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVGH.PROGRESS_CD , IVHD.PURCHASE_TYPE , IVHD.INV_NUM , IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , IVDT.INV_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVHD.CUR , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , IVDT.ITEM_AMT , (GRDT.GR_QT, 0) AS GR_QT , (GRDT.GR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS GR_DATE , PODT.PO_NUM , PODT.PO_SQ , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , PODT.DUE_DATE , IVGH.SEND_DATE AS INV_DATE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , IVDT.VAT_AMT , IVHD.REG_DATE , IVHD.MOD_DATE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , GRDT.GR_NUM , IVGH.REJECT_DATE , IVGH.REJECT_RMK , POHD.VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , POHD.VAT_TYPE FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM) JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCGRDT GRDT ON (GRDT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND GRDT.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND GRDT.INV_SQ = IVDT.INV_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM) WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'DI' AND IVGH.SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND IVHD.REG_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVHD.REG_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND IVGH.SEND_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVGH.SEND_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND PODT.DUE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE = #{PURCHASE_TYPE}
AND UPPER(IVHD.INV_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INV_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(PODT.ITEM_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%'
ORDER BY IVDT.INV_NUM DESC, IVDT.INV_SQ
